titleStmt.title: SII 40.176: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 176. (A.R. No. B. 311 of 1931.) Oppicherla, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab lying on the road to Durgi about 1(1/2) miles from the village.
This is dated Śaka 1257, Yuva, Kārttīka, śu. 15, Wednesday, corresponding to 1335 A.D., November 21.
Records the configuration of the former gift of some lands in the village Vrappicherla in Palnāḍu to certain individuals viz., Sarasvati Guṇḍaya, Gōpalabhaṭla and Pōtubhaṭla by Pratāparudra-Mahārāja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śubhaśāsana Abhyudaya śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1257
Agunēṁṭi yiva saṁvvatsara kā¨rttika śu 15 bu brahmā viṣṇuvā¨rṇāsi viśēśvaradēvara koli
vāṁḍu gōpānāṁḍu dolli kokkēśvara mahārājunāṁḍu pagalu cukalu poḍistēnu
sarasvati guṁḍāyya bhaṭla kṣētraṁmu . mēmunu gōpāḷabhaṭlaknu pōtubhaṭlannu bollipeddiṁgārikini pā
daprakṣādasēsi palnāṁṭi lōpali vrappice¨rlanu pūrvaṁ maṁdulanu pratāparudra mahārājulu
yiccina gṛhārāmakṣētrālu Aṭṭē yistimi maḍuṁgu kha 8 na 15 svadattā dvi
guṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svadattā niṣphalaṁ bha
vēt sasēyirā
Digital edition of SII 40.176 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
